位置索引.原文: the molar ratio of PDA and 4,4′-ODA was kept at 7/3 for all PI systems in this research. The polyimide precursor resin—PAA resin solution was synthesized by polycondensation of equimolar aromatic dianhydride (s-BPDA) with a mixture of three different aromatic diamines, including PDA, 4,4′-ODA, and 1,7-bis(aminophenyl)-meta-carborane (BACB) in NMP. The mixture was continuously stirred at room temperature in N2 atmosphere for a further 48h to get a homogeneous poly(amic acid) (PAA) solution. Then the viscous PAA solution was filtrated by G1 sand cored funnel and degassed under vacuum for 2h in order to prepare a defect-free film. A series of CPI-x films with various boron-loadings (x represents the molar ratio of BACB in diamine monomers and is equal to 0, 5, 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50, respectively) were obtained.

反应条件.制备过程: 将脱气后的PAA溶液涂布在预清洗玻璃板上，按程序进行热酰亚胺化，得到自支撑聚酰亚胺薄膜。
反应条件.反应条件: 热酰亚胺化：升温速率2°C/min，程序为120°C/2h、200°C/1h、300°C/1h、400°C/0.5h

位置索引.原文: Subsequently, the PAA solution was coated onto a pre-cleaned glass plate and thermally imidized according to the following schedule: 120°C/2h, 200°C/1h, 300°C/1h, 400°C/0.5h with a heating rate of 2°C min−1 to prepare the self-supporting films. As a consequence, reddish-brown CPI films with a thickness of about 50 μm were obtained. A series of CPI-x films with various boron-loadings (x represents the molar ratio of BACB in diamine monomers and is equal to 0, 5, 10, 20, 30, 40, and 50, respectively) were obtained.

位置索引.原文: A typical polymerization process of CPI-20 was prepared in the following procedure: in a dried three-necked flask, equipped with an electric agitation, nitrogen gas inlet and outlet, PDA (1.8168 g, 16.8 mmol), 4,4′-ODA (1.4417 g, 7.2 mmol), BACB (1.9586 g, 6 mmol), and part of anhydrous NMP (32 mL) were added. The mixture was stirred at room temperature until the diamine was completely dissolved, then an equimolar amount of dianhydride s-BPDA (8.8266 g, 30 mmol) and residual NMP (10 mL) were added into the solution to adjust the solid content to approximately 25 wt.% The mixture was continuously stirred at room temperature in N2 atmosphere for a further 48h to get a homogeneous poly(amic acid) (PAA) solution. Then the viscous PAA solution was filtrated by G1 sand cored funnel and degassed under vacuum for 2h in order to prepare a defect-free film.

位置索引.原文: Subsequently, the PAA solution was coated onto a pre-cleaned glass plate and thermally imidized according to the following schedule: 120°C/2h, 200°C/1h, 300°C/1h, 400°C/0.5h with a heating rate of 2°C min−1 to prepare the self-supporting films. As a consequence, reddish-brown CPI films with a thickness of about 50 μm were obtained. This series of CPI films were named as CPI-x, in which x represents the molar ratio of BACB, CPI-20 corresponds to x=20.

反应条件.制备过程: 3.0 g of RHA pre-oxidized at 600℃ for 2 h was mixed with 10 mL of chloroform in the flask; chlorosulfonic acid was added dropwise over 20 min under stirring in an ice bath, after addition completed, the mixture was stirred for additional 2 h at room temperature to remove residual HCl gas

位置索引.原文: 3.0 g of RHA, which had been produced under 2h 600℃ oxidation, was mixed with 10 mL of chloroform in a 100 mL suction flask with a constant-pressure dropping funnel which was filled with 0.7 mL of chlorosulfonic acid. An inlet gas tube was equipped on the funnel as to conduct HCl gas produced into the water. The reaction mixture was stirred in an ice bath while chlorosulfonic acid was flow dropwise over 20 min into the flask. The mixture was stirred for an additional 2 h at room temperature after the addition was finished as to remove the remaining HCl gas. The mixture was washed with methanol and filtered. The solid residue was dried in an oven under 70℃ for 1 h to afford sulfonated RHA (sRHA) in powder form.

位置索引.原文: Synthesis of soluble PI resin: METI resin was prepared by a high-temperature polycondensation method, using ODPA, BAPPT, and MEPA as raw materials, by controlling the ratio of the three raw materials. METI resins with molecular weights of 5000g/mol, 10,000g/mol, and 20,000g/mol were designed and named METI-5K, 10K, and 20K, respectively. The METI-10K and METI-5K resins were prepared according to a procedure similar to the one mentioned above, with the formula shown in Table 1. First, the methylethynyl-terminated polyamic acid (MEPA-PAA) was synthesized using ODPA, BAPPT, and MEPA as the starting materials.

反应条件.制备过程: 将MEPA-PAA反应体系加热至140-145℃，通过甲苯-水共沸除去反应生成的副产物水，保持回流脱水反应16 h；蒸出体系中的甲苯直至反应内温达到180℃，于180℃反应1 h；反应完成后将溶液冷却至70℃

后处理步骤: 将冷却后的粘稠反应液在过量10wt%乙醇水溶液中沉淀
所得沉淀先于室温干燥24 h
再于130℃真空干燥24 h，得到颗粒状METI-5K树脂

位置索引.原文: Then, toluene was distilled from the reaction system until the internal temperature of the reaction reached 180°C, and the reaction was carried out at 180°C for 1 h. The solution was cooled to 70°C and the resulting viscous solution was precipitated in excess aqueous ethanol (10wt%). Finally, the precipitated METI-20K resin was dried at room temperature for 24h, and then dried under vacuum at 130°C for 24h. Then, the soluble METI resins were afforded after dehydration at 180°C. At last, METI-5K was obtained as granular resin. METI-5K: yield: 28.76g (95.8%).

位置索引.原文: 2.5. Preparation of Stainless Steel Samples Adhered with the METI NFMs: The stainless steel adherends (100mm×25.4mm×2mm, length × width × height) used for the lap shear stress (LSS) test were pretreated by polishing with standard sandpaper before use. The METI NFMs were cut into small pieces (12.5mm×25.4mm length × width), stacked, and placed between two stainless steel adherends. The thickness of the final cured METI NFMs was controlled to be 0.3 - 0.5mm. The overlapping area was 12.5mm×25.4mm (length × width). The METI NFMs were tightly clamped to the overlap of two stainless steel sheets. Subsequently, the METI NFM-adhered specimens were placed into an oven and then heated at 80°C, 150°C, 220°C, 290°C, 310°C, and 330°C each for 1h. Then, the samples were cooled to room temperature.

位置索引.原文: The following presentation takes METI-20K as an example to introduce the synthesis process of METI resin in detail: BAPPT (19.3218 g, 38.6019 mmol) and NMP (100 g) were charged into a 500 mL three-necked flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer, an electric heating bath, and a Dean-Stark trap and purged with nitrogen at room temperature, then ODPA (11.5094 g, 37.1019 mmol) was added to the solution and stirred for 5h. MEPA (0.5585 g, 3 mmol) and NMP (25 g) were added at the same time, and the solid content of the reaction mixture was controlled to be about 20wt%. After stirring for another 14h at room temperature, toluene (100 g) and isoquinoline (1.0 g) were then added to the solution after stirring for a further 14h at room temperature.

位置索引.原文: The reaction mixture was heated to 140 - 145°C, and the by-product water generated by the reaction was removed by toluene/water azeotrope. The refluxing dehydration reaction was maintained for 16h. Then, toluene was distilled from the reaction system until the internal temperature of the reaction reached 180°C, and the reaction was carried out at 180°C for 1h. The solution was cooled to 70°C and the resulting viscous solution was precipitated in excess aqueous ethanol (10wt%). Finally, the precipitated METI-20K resin was dried at room temperature for 24h, and then dried under vacuum at 130°C for 24h. Finally, white filamentous METI-20K resin was obtained, yield: 29.62g(97.7%).

反应条件.制备过程: 将METI-20K静电纺丝溶液注入装有喷丝头的5mL注射器，通过注射泵以0.2mL/h的速率从喷丝头挤出；设置电压和接收参数后，METI-20K纤维沉积在铝箔上得到METI-20K NFM
反应条件.反应条件: 挤出速率0.2mL/h，正电压16kV，负电压-3kV，接收距离15cm，相对湿度30±5%，收集器转速2rpm

位置索引.原文: The obtained METI-20K solution was uniformly injected into a 5mL syringe using a spinneret with an inner diameter of 0.21mm. The METI-20K solution was extruded from the spinneret with a syringe pump at a rate of 0.2mL/h. The positive voltage between the injector and the collector was 16kV and the negative voltage was -3kV. The distance between the spinneret and the grounded drum collector (diameter: 10cm; length: 30cm) was 15cm. The relative humidity of the electrospinning device was controlled at 30± 5%, and the speed of the collector was set at 2rpm. METI-20K fibers were densely wound and deposited on aluminum foil. The resulting METI-20K NFM was vacuum-dried at 120°C for 1h to remove residual solvent.

位置索引.原文: The obtained METI-20K solution was uniformly injected into a 5mL syringe using a spinneret with an inner diameter of 0.21mm. The METI-20K solution was extruded from the spinneret with a syringe pump at a rate of 0.2mL/h. The positive voltage between the injector and the collector was 16kV and the negative voltage was -3kV. The distance between the spinneret and the grounded drum collector (diameter: 10cm; length: 30cm) was 15cm. The relative humidity of the electrospinning device was controlled at 30± 5%, and the speed of the collector was set at 2rpm. METI-20K fibers were densely wound and deposited on aluminum foil. The resulting METI-20K NFM was vacuum-dried at 120°C for 1h to remove residual solvent

位置索引.原文: The stainless steel adherends (100mm×25.4mm×2mm, length × width × height) used for the lap shear stress (LSS) test were pretreated by polishing with standard sandpaper before use. The METI UFMs were cut into small pieces (12.5mm×25.4mm length × width), stacked, and placed between two stainless steel adherends. The thickness of the final cured METI NFMs was controlled to be 0.3 - 0.5mm. The overlapping area was 12.5mm×25.4mm (length × width). The METI NFMs were tightly clamped to the overlap of two stainless steel sheets. Subsequently, the METI NFM-adhered specimens were placed into an oven and then heated at 80°C, 150°C, 220°C, 290°C, 310°C, and 330°C each for 1h. Then, the samples were cooled to room temperature

The solution was refluxed at 170°C for 16h until the imidization of PAA was completed. The product solution was slowly cooled down, and excess ethanol was poured into the solution for PI precipitation in order to separate it from the unreacted monomers or low-molecular-weight PI. Finally, the PI precipitate was dried in a vacuum oven at 150°C for 8h.

位置索引.原文: The catalyst isoquinoline (2wt%) was then added into the three-necked flask, and the temperature was increased to 170°C. The solution was refluxed at 170°C for 16h until the imidization of PAA was completed. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

反应条件.制备过程: 将粘稠的聚酰胺酸溶液用额外的100 mL DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入600 mL去离子水中进行沉淀

位置索引.原文: First,  $0.750\mathrm{g}$  polyamic acid,  $0.363\mathrm{g}$  TEA, and  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入七个特氟龙球辅助解聚CNC粉末，在1500rpm下搅拌10min，形成均匀CNC水凝胶
反应条件.反应条件: 转速1500rpm

位置索引.原文: Next,  $700\mathrm{mg}$  of CNCs was dispersed in  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $10\mathrm{min}$  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶在1500rpm下混合30min，调整CNC的用量，得到CNCs浓度为5.6wt%、聚酰胺酸浓度为7.0wt%的目标PAAS/CNC ink
反应条件.反应条件: 转速1500rpm

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $30\mathrm{min}$ . The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  $7.0\mathrm{wt\%}$  and  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  $5.6\mathrm{wt\%}$ ,  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , and  $7.4\mathrm{wt\%}$  CNCs.

位置索引.原文: First, 4.806g (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with 100 mL DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of 5.235g (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another 100 mL DMF, and slowly poured into 600 mL deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at 50℃ for more than two days before use.

位置索引.原文: The reaction between DHC and diamines was performed at 80°C in both CH3CN and toluene-ethanol mixtures (2:1 (v/v)) for 24h to complete the ring-opening aminolysis reaction; 1,3-Diaminopropane was selected as the diamine for synthesizing poly(DHC-Bz-propylamide)

原料.原料名称: 开环氨解聚酰胺中间体

反应条件.制备过程: 向开环氨解反应完成后的混合物中加入多聚甲醛，回流反应形成苯并恶嗪环，得到目标聚合物
反应条件.反应条件: 回流

位置索引.原文: and then paraformaldehyde was added into the mixtures under reflux for a further 12h to form the benzoxazine ring. 1,3-Diaminopropane, 1,6-diaminohexane, and Jeffamine® ED-900 were selected as diamines for regulating the flexibility of the main-chain polybenzoxazine precursor. The obtained polymers were abbreviated as poly(DHC-Bz-propylamide), poly(DHC-Bz-hexylamide), and poly(DHC-Bz-jeffamide), respectively.

位置索引.原文: 1,3-Diaminopropane, 1,6-diaminohexane, and Jeffamine® ED-900 were selected as diamines for regulating the flexibility of the main-chain polybenzoxazine precursor. The obtained polymers were abbreviated as poly(DHC-Bz-propylamide), poly(DHC-Bz-hexylamide), and poly(DHC-Bz-jeffamide), respectively. The reaction between DHC and diamines was performed at 80°C in both CH3CN and toluene-ethanol mixtures (2:1 (v/v)) for 24h to complete the ring-opening aminolysis reaction, and then paraformaldehyde was added into the mixtures under reflux for a further 12h to form the benzoxazine ring. A representative procedure is as follows: A mixture of 3,4-dihydrocoumarine (0.772 g, 0.003 mol), bisamine ... was placed in a 250 mL round-bottom flask containing 60 mL of toluene and 30 mL of ethanol or acetonitrile. This mixture was refluxed for 24 h. Then, paraformaldehyde (0.360 g, 0.012 mol) was added to the reaction mixture and refluxed for a further 12 h. Thereafter, the contents of the flask were concentrated using a rotary evaporator. The remaining solution was added into cold methanol (200 mL) dropwise, and kept in a refrigerator for 24 h. The solvent was decanted and the polymer washed with cold methanol. Finally, the polymer was dried at ambient temperature in a vacuum chamber for 24 h to obtain a transparent orange-colored oily polymer.

原料.原料类型: 主链聚苯并恶嗪前驱体

反应条件.制备过程: 将主链聚苯并恶嗪前驱体溶解在丙酮中，注入特氟龙模具，室温挥发溶剂3天，随后在烘箱中120℃热处理10min除去残留溶剂，逐步升温至180℃固化0.5h，得到固化交联薄膜
反应条件.反应条件: 溶剂挥发：室温，3天；除残留溶剂：120℃，10min；固化：180℃，0.5h

位置索引.原文: To obtain polybenzoxazine film, 1 g of main-chain polybenzoxazine precursor was dissolved in 10 mL of acetone and charged into a Teflon mold. The solvent was evaporated at room temperature for 3 days. Then, the film was subjected to a heat treatment at 120°C for 10 min in an ordinary oven for the removal of solvent residues, and then gradually heated up to 180°C and cured for 0.5 h. After curing, a dark-orange, transparent, and flexible crosslinked film with a smooth surface was obtained.

After cooling to room temperature, either one of the aromatic dianhydrides or both together were placed in a three-neck flask in solid form for approximately an hour. The solution was stirred in a nitrogen environment for 24h to evaluate the poly(amic acids) (PAA)

The solution was stirred in a nitrogen environment for 24h to evaluate the poly(amic acids) (PAA).

反应条件.反应装置: 旋转蒸馏装置、减压干燥装置
反应条件.制备过程: 将α-BPDA和NA混合于乙醇中，溶液在溶剂回流下搅拌三小时得到均相溶液；随后加入PDA和BIA，在溶剂回流下继续搅拌两小时得到均相PEAS溶液；旋转蒸馏除去大部分溶剂后，将粘性液体在200℃下减压干燥；所得固体树脂粉碎为细粉并过筛，得到粒径为50~200μm的粉末；通过调整芳香二胺的摩尔比，得到BIA/(BIA + PDA)摩尔比为0%、计算分子量Mw为1500g/mol的NPO-0
反应条件.反应条件: 两段回流搅拌，减压干燥

后处理步骤: 旋转蒸馏除去大部分溶剂

位置索引.原文: α-BPDA (0.1 mol) (29.42 g) and NA (0.07 mol) (11.49 g) were combined in 63.58 g of ethanol (1.38 mol). The solution was stirred at solvent reflux for three hours to obtain a homogeneous solution. Then, 11.68 g of PDA (0.108 mol) and 6.06 g of BIA (0.027 mol) were added, and the solution was stirred at solvent reflux for another two hours to produce a homogeneous PEAS solution. After removing most of the solvent by rotating distillation, the viscous liquid was dried at a reduced pressure at 200℃. The obtained solid resin was crushed into a fine powder and sieved, yielding a powder with a particle diameter of 50 to 200μm. In addition, a series of NPO powders (NPO-0, NPO-1, and NPO-3) with a fixed calcd Mw of 1500g/mol but different BIA/(BIA + PDA) molar ratios of 0% 10% ,and 30% respectively, were prepared by adjusting the molar ratio of aromatic diamines.

工艺流程.产物名称: 闭孔刚性聚酰亚胺泡沫PIF-0

反应条件.制备过程: 通过NPO粉末在闭模中热发泡制备聚酰亚胺泡沫：将NPO-0粉末放入模具底部，随后将模具置于热压机中加热，分步升温至350℃，施加压力并保温三小时；之后将模具冷却至室温，取出刚性PI泡沫，切割成所需测试尺寸；PIF-0固定计算分子量Mw为1500g/mol，BIA/(BIA + PDA)摩尔比为0%，除非另有说明，泡沫密度为100kg/m³
反应条件.反应条件: 分步升温，加压保温

位置索引.原文: The polyimide foams were prepared by thermal foaming of the NPO powder in a closed mold. The NPO powder was placed at the bottom of the mold, which was then heated in a hot press. The mold was heated stepwise to 350℃ and held for three hours with applied pressure. Then, the mold was cooled to room temperature and the rigid PI foam was removed and cut into the desired dimensions for testing. Hence, a series of rigid PI foams (PIF-0, PIF-1, PIF-2, and PIF-3) with a fixed calcd Mw of 1500g/mol but different molar ratios of BIA/(BIA + PDA) of 0%, 10%, 20%, and 30% were prepared, respectively. Unless otherwise indicated, the density of the foam was 100kg/m³.

Then, the mold was cooled to room temperature and the rigid PI foam was removed and cut into the desired dimensions for testing. The mold was heated stepwise to 350℃ and held for three hours with applied pressure. Then, the mold was cooled to room temperature and the rigid PI foam was removed and cut into the desired dimensions for testing. The amount of NPO powder placed in the mold was determined according to the desired foam density and mold volume as well as the calculated amounts of organic volatiles evolved in the thermal foaming process. Additionally, a series of rigid PI foams with a fixed BIA/(BIA + PDA) molar ratio of 20% and calcd Mw of 1500g/mol but different densities were prepared by adjusting precursor mass according to the formula. The foam density is determined by the mass of precursor and mold volume.

After several times being washed by deionized water, the as-spun PAA fibers were dried in an air oven at 80°C for 12h.

位置索引.原文: The BPDA-PDA PAA was synthesized in a dried DMAc solvent by mixing BPDA and PDA in a molar ratio of 1.01/1.00. This PAA solution was filtered and degassed before fiber spinning.

反应条件.制备过程: 采用干喷湿纺技术制备初生PAA纤维，将PAA溶液通过喷丝板（50孔，孔径120μm）先挤出至空气中，再引入凝固浴，喷丝板与凝固浴之间的气隙约为5cm，凝固浴为水与DMAc的混合液，体积比为5/5

位置索引.原文: As-spun PAA fibers were prepared via dry-jet wet-spinning technology, by extruding the PAA solution through a spinneret (50 holes, 120μm) into air first, and then drawn into a coagulation bath. The air gap between the spinneret and the coagulation bath was approximately 5cm. The coagulation bath was a mixture of water and DMAc (v/v = 5/5). After several times being washed by deionized water, the as-spun PAA fibers were dried in an air oven at 80℃ for 12h.

原料.原料名称: 5 wt% EP掺杂6FDA-ODA聚酰胺酸混合溶液
原料.原料类型: 聚酰亚胺前驱体混合溶液

反应条件.制备过程: 薄薄膜采用旋涂法涂覆到基底，厚薄膜采用棒涂法在室温下涂覆得到PAA湿膜；干燥过程中诱导PAA链间发生交联反应，得到交联PAA干膜
反应条件.反应条件: 干燥程序：110℃ for 2h, 120℃ for 1h

位置索引.原文: A thin film of PI was applied to the substrate by spin coating using a PAA solution with or without epoxy (EP). In addition, a thick film was prepared by bar coating at room temperature using the same high-concentration PI solution. The prepared PAA film was dried in a high-temperature vacuum drying oven (110°C for 2h, 120°C for 1h). a PAA film containing a small amount of EP in PAA was dried using the same process as the neat PAA film to induce a crosslinking reaction. When preparing a crosslinked PAA film bearing 5 wt% of EP, the film was cured at 110°C for 2h and 120°C for 1h to dry the PAA film and induce a crosslinking reaction between the PAA chains

原料.原料名称: 干燥交联5 wt% EP交联6FDA-ODA聚酰胺酸薄膜
原料.原料类型: 交联聚酰胺酸前驱体薄膜

反应条件.制备过程: 对交联PAA薄膜进行热处理，使未参与交联反应的PAA重复单元发生热酰亚胺化，得到最终交联聚酰亚胺薄膜

位置索引.原文: By heat-treating the crosslinked PAA film at 230°C, most of the repeating groups of PAA that did not participate in the crosslinking were imidized. The final 6FDA-ODA PI film was obtained by thermal imidization in a vacuum oven at 230°C for 30min. Then, the cured film was heated to 230°C for the final imidization of the repeating groups that did not participate in the crosslinking between the PAA chains

工艺流程.产物名称: ITO玻璃基底上5 wt% EP交联6FDA-ODA聚酰亚胺液晶对齐层

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAA混合溶液旋涂在带ITO电极的玻璃基底上，得到100nm厚湿膜，先干燥再热处理完成酰亚胺化，得到基底上的PI对齐层
反应条件.反应条件: 干燥：80℃ 1min；酰亚胺化：230℃ 30min

位置索引.原文: A 100nm thick polymer film was prepared by spin-coating a PAA solution on a glass substrate with an ITO electrode, after which the PAA thin film was dried at 80°C for 1min, followed by heat treatment at 230°C for 30min to prepare the PI layer

反应条件.制备过程: 加入甲苯后加热回流，通过共沸蒸馏脱除热酰亚胺化反应生成的水；反应完成后冷却至100-120°C

位置索引.原文: After that, 10g of toluene was added into the reaction solution and the mixture was heated and refluxed at 180°C for 8-12h and, in the meantime, the water evolved in the thermal imidization was removed by azeotropic distillation. After cooling down to 100-120°C, the reaction solution was poured into excess ethanol to produce white precipitate, which was then collected by filtration, washed repeatedly with ethanol, and dried in vacuum at 220°C for 4h. The grey yellow solid powder of PIS-A10 oligoimide was obtained (yield: 39.29g,97%).

反应条件.反应装置: 不锈钢模具、热压机、空气烘箱（后固化用）
反应条件.制备过程: 将低聚酰亚胺粉末放入不锈钢模具，置于预热至250°C的热压机；以4°C/min速率升温至300°C保温20min；再以3°C/min速率升温至360°C保温10-30min，逐步施加1.5MPa压力；继续升温至370°C保温2h；冷却至200°C后取出得到尺寸为80mm×80mm×2mm的固化片；可根据需要在空气烘箱中进行后固化热处理
反应条件.反应条件: 压力1.5MPa

位置索引.原文: The oligoimide powders were put in a stainless steel mold, which was then placed in a hot press preheated at 250°C. The mold was heated to 300°C at a ramp rate of 4°C/min and kept there for 20min. Then, the mold was heated to 360°C at a ramp rate of 3°C/min and kept for 10-30min, and a pressure of 1.5MPa was applied gradually. After that, the mold was heated to 370°C and kept for 2h. After the mold was cooled to 200°C, the cured polyimide sheet with the dimension of 80mm × 80mm × 2mm was removed from the mold. In the postcuring procedure, the cured polyimide sheets were thermally treated in the air oven at the corresponding temperature and time.

After that, 10g of toluene was added into the reaction solution and the mixture was heated and refluxed at 180°C for 8-12h and, in the meantime, the water evolved in the thermal imidization was removed by azeotropic distillation.

After cooling down to 100-120°C, the reaction solution was poured into excess ethanol to produce white precipitate, which was then collected by filtration, washed repeatedly with ethanol, and dried in vacuum at 220°C for 4h. PIS-T10 is the phenylethynyl-terminated oligoimide containing siloxane structure obtained by this route, with solid powder morphology.

The mold was heated to 300°C at a ramp rate of 4°C/min and kept there for 20min. Then, the mold was heated to 360°C at a ramp rate of 3°C/min and kept for 10-30min, and a pressure of 1.5MPa was applied gradually. After that, the mold was heated to 370°C and kept for 2h. After the mold was cooled to 200°C, the cured polyimide sheet with the dimension of 80mm × 80mm × 2mm was removed from the mold. In the postcuring procedure, the cured polyimide sheets were thermally treated in the air oven at the corresponding temperature and time.

反应条件.制备过程: TPE-Q和DMF加入烧瓶，N₂气氛下持续搅拌至二胺完全溶解；PMDA连同额外DMF分三次加入所得淡黄色二胺溶液，快速加入PMDA以避免引入水分导致二酐水解；完全加入后在室温N₂保护下反应2小时保证充分聚合，得到产物

位置索引.原文: 5.84 g of TPE-Q (0.02mol,1 equiv.) and 30 mL of DMF were added to the flask. The mixture was continuously stirred under an N₂ atmosphere. Until the diamines were completely dissolved, 4.36 g of PMDA (0.02mol,1 equiv.) and 30 mL of DMF were weighed and added into the obtained pale yellow diamine solution by three times. Considering the possible hydrolysis of dianhydride, the addition of PMDA should be fast to avoid the introduction of moisture. The solution became viscous immediately after the PMDA was completely added. The reaction last for 2h under the protection of N₂ at room temperature to ensure full polymerization. Then, the viscous and homogeneous PAA solution was obtained.

In comparison, commercially available films were also characterized for thickness and uniformity, as shown in Figure 3b. Compared to the commercially available films, the films prepared by this method with similar thickness showed significantly better uniformity.

反应条件.制备过程: 先将TPE-Q和30mL DMF加入烧瓶，N₂气氛下持续搅拌至二胺完全溶解；将PMDA分三次加入所得淡黄色二胺溶液中，同时加入剩余30mL DMF，快速加入以避免引入水分导致二酐水解；PMDA完全加入后N₂保护下室温反应2小时保证充分聚合，得到粘稠均匀的PAA溶液

位置索引.原文: 5.84g of TPE-Q (0.02mol,1 equiv.) and 30 mL of DMF were added to the flask. The mixture was continuously stirred under an N₂ atmosphere. Until the diamines were completely dissolved, 4.36g of PMDA (0.02mol,1 equiv.) and 30 mL of DMF were weighed and added into the obtained pale yellow diamine solution by three times. Considering the possible hydrolysis of dianhydride, the addition of PMDA should be fast to avoid the introduction of moisture. The solution became viscous immediately after the PMDA was completely added. The reaction last for 2h under the protection of N₂ at room temperature to ensure full polymerization. Then, the viscous and homogeneous PAA solution was obtained.

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAA前驱体溶液旋涂涂覆在清洁基底上得到PAA湿膜
反应条件.反应条件: 旋涂转速范围为1000~9000rpm

位置索引.原文: As shown in Figure 1b, the PI films were prepared from PAA by spin coating. The spin coating speed was set to 1000 to 9000rpm. Glass and Si/SiO₂ were selected as substrates, in which glass substrates needed ultrasonic cleaning before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 对PAA湿膜进行梯度升温固化，通过热酰亚胺化得到PI薄膜
反应条件.反应条件: 梯度固化程序：70℃保温1h，150℃保温2h，200℃保温1h，250℃保温1h

位置索引.原文: After coating on a clean substrate, the PAA film was treated through a series of gradient curing in an oven at 70℃ for 1h, 150℃ for 2h, 200℃ for 1h, and 250℃ for 1h. After cooling to ambient temperature, the PI films were immersed in deionized water for 0.5h, then peeled off from the substrates. They were washed with ethanol, and dried at room temperature for further use. When the film thickness was 26.8μm, the tensile strength and elongation at break reached 194.71MPa and 130.13%, respectively.

Until the diamines were completely dissolved, 4.36g of PMDA (0.02mol,1 equiv.) and 30 mL of DMF were weighed and added into the obtained pale yellow diamine solution by three times. Considering the possible hydrolysis of dianhydride, the addition of PMDA should be fast to avoid the introduction of moisture. The solution became viscous immediately after the PMDA was completely added. The reaction last for 2h under the protection of N₂ at room temperature to ensure full polymerization. Then, the viscous and homogeneous PAA solution was obtained.

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAA溶液通过旋涂法涂覆在干净基底上，旋涂速度设置为1000~9000rpm；玻璃基底使用前需进行超声清洗。

反应条件.制备过程: 对涂覆在基底上的PAA膜进行梯度升温热固化，通过热酰亚胺化得到PI薄膜，固化程序为70℃保持1h，150℃保持2h，200℃保持1h，250℃保持1h。
反应条件.反应条件: 梯度热固化热酰亚胺化，程序：70℃ 1h，150℃ 2h，200℃ 1h，250℃ 1h

位置索引.原文: After coating on a clean substrate, the PAA film was treated through a series of gradient curing in an oven at 70℃ for 1h, 150℃ for 2h, 200℃ for 1h, and 250℃ for 1h. After cooling to ambient temperature, the PI films were immersed in deionized water for 0.5h, then peeled off from the substrates. They were washed with ethanol, and dried at room temperature for further use.

位置索引.原文: Preparation of a PI/PVdF mixed solution. The polymer solution was prepared from 6.5 wt.% poly (vinylidene fluoride) (PVdF, Atofina, Kynar 761) and 6.5 wt.% polyimide (PI, Ciba Specialty, Matrimid 5218) in a mixed solvent system containing dimethylacetamide (DMAc)/tetrahydrofuran (THF) (6/4, wt. ratio). The polymer materials were dried under vacuum at  80℃  to eliminate any moisture and volatile impurities before the polymer solution was prepared. HPLC-grade solvents (Merck) were used in the electrospinning experiments without any further purification. The polymer materials were added to the mixed solvents, and then, the mixture was stirred at  80℃  to prepare the homogeneously dispersed polymer solution. (a,d,g) MCS2, PI:PVdF = 2:1 wt. ratio

位置索引.原文: The nanofibrous PI/PVdF MCS composite membrane was prepared using the single nozzle electrospinning method that was described in detail in earlier studies[21,22]. 位置索引.原文: Post-processing (including hot pressing at  150℃ , heat stretching at  150℃  and then post-heat treatment at  170℃ ) was on the electrospun membrane to control its thickness and porosity. The membrane with a thickness of approximately  20μm  was obtained after post-processing. This post-processed membrane was dried in a vacuum oven at  80℃  to remove any remaining solvents and was then stored in a glove box filled with argon gas  (H₂O < 1ppm)  prior to use.

位置索引.原文: Cell preparation. Two types of cells (i.e., conductivity and prototype cells) for both MCS1 and PE separators were prepared. The conductivity cells were assembled by sandwiching the separators between the two blocking stainless steel electrodes. The polymer electrolyte was prepared by soaking the separator in an electrolyte solution of  1M LiPF₆ -EC/PC/DEC/VC (35.4/17.2/45.1/2.3 wt.%) at room temperature in a glove box filled with argon gas. The prototype cell was prepared by assembling three components, i.e., the polyelectrolyte, a mesocarbon microbead (MCMB) anode (SKC supplied, South Korea) and a  LiCoO₂  cathode (SKC supplied, Korea) in a vacuum-sealed aluminum-plastic pouch. The cell size was  3cm×4cm , and its theoretical capacity was  141mAh / g . The entire assembling process was performed in a glove box filled with argon gas (H₂O < 1ppm) .

反应条件.制备过程: 采用单喷嘴静电纺丝法制备纳米纤维初生膜，工艺参数为：施加电压10.5kV，针头-接地收集极距离14cm，针头尺寸30G，溶液进料速率30μl/min

位置索引.原文: Preparation and post-treatments of the PI/PVdF MCS composite membranes. The nanofibrous PI/PVdF MCS composite membrane was prepared using the single nozzle electrospinning method that was described in detail in earlier studies[21,22]. An applied voltage of  10.5kV, a tip-grounded collector distance of  14cm, a needle size of  30G, and a solution feeding rate of  30μl/min  were the parameters used.

原料.原料名称: 静电纺PI/PVdF MCS0.5纳米纤维初生膜

后处理步骤: 储存于含水量<1ppm的氩气手套箱中备用

位置索引.原文: Post-processing (including hot pressing at  150℃, heat stretching at  150℃  and then post-heat treatment at  170℃) was on the electrospun membrane to control its thickness and porosity. The membrane with a thickness of approximately  20μm  was obtained after post-processing. This post-processed membrane was dried in a vacuum oven at  80℃  to remove any remaining solvents and was then stored in a glove box filled with argon gas (H2O < 1ppm) prior to use.

工艺流程.产物名称: 装载MCS0.5复合隔膜的锂离子电池

反应条件.制备过程: 分为电导池和原型电池：电导池将MCS0.5隔膜夹在两个阻塞不锈钢电极之间；原型电池将吸饱电解液的MCS0.5隔膜与MCMB阳极、LiCoO2阴极组装后真空密封在铝塑袋中，电池尺寸为3cm×4cm，理论容量141mAh/g，全部组装过程在含水量<1ppm的氩气手套箱中进行
反应条件.反应条件: H2O < 1ppm

位置索引.原文: Cell preparation. Two types of cells (i.e., conductivity and prototype cells) for both MCS1 and PE separators were prepared. The conductivity cells were assembled by sandwiching the separators between the two blocking stainless steel electrodes. The polymer electrolyte was prepared by soaking the separator in an electrolyte solution of  1M LiPF6 -EC/PC/DEC/VC (35.4/17.2/45.1/2.3 wt.%) at room temperature in a glove box filled with argon gas. The prototype cell was prepared by assembling three components, i.e., the polyelectrolyte, a mesocarbon microbead (MCMB) anode (SKC supplied, Korea) and a  LiCoO2  cathode (SKC supplied, Korea) in a vacuum-sealed aluminum-plastic pouch. The cell size was  3cm× 4cm, and its theoretical capacity was  141mAh / g. The entire assembling process was performed in a glove box filled with argon gas (H2O < 1ppm).

反应条件.制备过程: Before adding reagents, the three-neck flask was heated with constant nitrogen purge for one hour, then cooled with continued nitrogen purge to obtain oxygen-free condition. ODA was dissolved in NMP by stirring for 12h, after complete dissolution PMDA was added, the mixture was stirred continuously for 12h to get a homogeneous 15 wt% PAA solution. Excess ODA ensures the product is terminal diamine-terminated polyamic acid, namely PAA-ODA.

位置索引.原文: In PI-O-EP preparation, oxydianiline (ODA, 0.24 mol, 48.10g) was first dissolved in N-methylpyrrolidone (NMP) solvent by stirring (12h). After complete dissolution of ODA, pyromellitic dianhydride (PMDA, 0.23 mol, 49.95g) was added to the ODA solution. The mixture was stirred continuously for 12h to obtain a homogeneous PAA solution of 15wt%. Since a greater number of moles of ODA were added to the mixture, the resulting product was expected to be polyamic acid with terminal ODA, which is PAA-ODA. Table 1: PAA-ODA ODA/PMDA mole ratio is 0.24/0.23

反应条件.制备过程: Add EP resin with various weight ratios to the PAA-ODA solution, stir the mixture in nitrogen for 3 hours

位置索引.原文: Before adding reagents to a three-neck flask, the flask was heated with constant nitrogen purge for one hour, and then the flask was allowed to cool with continued nitrogen purge to assure an oxygen-free condition. In PI-P-EP preparation, ODA (0.24mol, 48.10g) was first dissolved in NMP solvent by stirring for 12h. After complete dissolution of ODA, PMDA (0.25mol, 54.30g) was added to the ODA solution. Because an excessive number of moles of PMDA were used to prepare PAA, the terminal functional groups are dianhydride, which is PAA-PMDA. The rest of the procedures are the same as in PI-O-EP preparation, where the mixture was stirred continuously for 12h to obtain a homogeneous PAA solution of 15wt%.

Six different PAAs were obtained by employing diamine mixtures with DAPBI molar contents of  0% ,  20% ,  40% ,  60% ,  80% , and  100% . The polymerization procedure for synthesizing the PAA for the PI-60 precursor is presented as an example: The molar ratio of ODA to DAPBI was 4:6, and the solid content was controlled at  15% . First, the ODA  (1.602g,8mmol)  was dissolved in  60 mL  DMAc at room temperature under  N₂  atmosphere. Then, a stoichiometric amount of BTDA  (6.445g,20mmol)  was added gradually to the suspension, and the mixture was stirred continually for  6h  to form a viscous PAA precursor solution. The PAA was sealed and stored at  0°C .

The polymerization procedure for synthesizing the PAA for the PI-60 precursor is presented as an example: The solid content was controlled at  15% . First, the ODA  (1.602g,8mmol)  was dissolved in  60 mL DMAc at room temperature under  N₂  atmosphere. Then, a stoichiometric amount of BTDA  (6.445g,20mmol)  was added gradually to the suspension, and the mixture was stirred continually for  6h to form a viscous PAA precursor solution. The PAA was sealed and stored at  0°C .

位置索引.原文: PI films were obtained by casting the PAA solution onto clean, dry glass plates with a  300μm depth blade. The solvent was then removed by drying the PAA films in an oven with a programmed procedure (50  °C for 1 h,  80°C for 1 h,  100°C for 1 h,  120°C for 0.5 h,  150°C for 0.5 h, and  180°C for 0.5 h) at a heating rate of  10°C / min. The PAA films were then cured in a vacuum oven at a heating rate of  5°C / min to afford PI films. The PI-0 film was obtained with a curing program of  200°C for 1 h,  250°C for 1 h,  300°C for 0.5 h, and  360°C for 0.5 h. 位置索引.原文: PAA precursors were prepared by copolymerization of the diamines ODA and DAPBI and the dianhydride BTDA at a 1:1 molar ratio of diamines and dianhydride. Six different PAAs were obtained by employing diamine mixtures with DAPBI molar contents of  0% ,  20% ,  40% ,  60% ,  80% , and  100% . The corresponding PI films were fabricated by coating, solvent drying, and thermal imidization, and denoted as PI-0, PI-20, PI-40, PI-60, PI-80, and PI-100. The polymerization procedure solid content was controlled at 15%.

位置索引.原文: The solvent was then removed by drying the PAA films in an oven with a programmed procedure (50  °C for 1 h,  80°C for 1 h,  100°C for 1 h,  120°C for 0.5 h,  150°C for 0.5 h, and  180°C for 0.5 h) at a heating rate of  10°C / min. The PAA films were then cured in a vacuum oven at a heating rate of  5°C / min to afford PI films. The PI-0 film was obtained with a curing program of  200°C for 1 h,  250°C for 1 h,  300°C for 0.5 h, and  360°C for 0.5 h. All the cured films were cooled to room temperature at a cooling rate of  3°C / min. The PI films with thicknesses of  30 μm were easily peeled from the glass plate.

The degree of terminal modification was 1/3.

后处理步骤: 用0.45μm聚四氟乙烯注射器过滤器过滤
过滤后置于玻璃瓶中于-18℃储存

Formulation for the synthesis of POSS-PAAs: POSS-PAA-10: PMDA 20.00 g (91.69 mmol), ODA 17.53 g (87.56 mmol), DABA-POSS 4.17 g (4.13 mmol), TSP-POSS 10.43 g, DMAc 208.5 g

反应条件.制备过程: 脱气后的POSS-PAA-10溶液升温至室温，刮涂于干净玻璃基底上，通过狭缝高度控制湿膜厚度

位置索引.原文: The degassed POSS-PAA-30 solution was warmed to room temperature before use, and then blade-coated onto a clean glass substrate. The thickness of the wet PAA films was controlled by the height of the slit. The other PAA solutions and the corresponding PI films were prepared according to a similar procedure.

反应条件.制备过程: 将负载湿膜的玻璃基底放入烘箱，按程序逐步升温进行热酰亚胺化固化，固化程序为：80℃/3h、120℃/1h、150℃/1h、180℃/1h、250℃/1h、300℃/1h、350℃/0.5h

后处理步骤: 将玻璃基底浸入温去离子水中，脱除基底得到自由站立复合膜

位置索引.原文: The glass substrates were then placed in an oven with flowing nitrogen gas. The POSS-PAA-30 was gradually thermally imidized with the following curing procedure: 80°C / 3h, 120°C / 1h, 150°C / 1h, 180°C / 1h, 250°C / 1h, 300°C / 1h, and 350°C / 0.5h. The experimental device is equipped with a mechanical stirrer, an ice-cold bath, and a  500-mL  three-necked round-bottom flask with nitrogen inlet. First, ODA  (15.35g,76.67mmol) , DABA-POSS  (15.15g,15.02mmol) , TSP-POSS  (12.63g)  and ultra-dry DMAc solvent  (182.5g)  were added into the flask. A clear solution was obtained after stirring at  5 - 10°C  for  2h  under nitrogen flow. Then, PMDA  (20.00g,91.69mmol)  and the additional DMAc  (70.0g)  were added to the reaction mixture obtained above. The solid content of the reaction mixture was adjusted to be  20wt%  by this procedure. The cold bath was removed and the reaction mixture was stirred at room temperature for another  22h . The deep-brown viscous solution obtained was filtered through a  0.45 - μm  polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) syringe filter. Then the prepared POSS-PAA-30 solution was stored in a glass bottle at  -18°C  before use.

The deep-brown viscous solution obtained was filtered through a 0.45-μm polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) syringe filter. 工艺流程.产物名称: POSS-PI-20 聚酰亚胺复合自由薄膜

原料.原料名称: POSS-PAA-20 聚酰胺酸复合前驱体溶液

反应条件.制备过程: 脱气后的POSS-PAA-20溶液升温至室温，刮刀涂布于干净玻璃基底上，控制湿膜厚度后放入烘箱进行逐步热酰亚胺化

后处理步骤: 热酰亚胺化完成后，将玻璃基底浸入温去离子水中，剥离得到自由站立的POSS-PI-20薄膜

位置索引.原文: The degassed POSS-PAA-30 solution was warmed to room temperature before use, and then blade-coated onto a clean glass substrate. The thickness of the wet PAA films was controlled by the height of the slit. The glass substrates were then placed in an oven with flowing nitrogen gas. The POSS-PAA-30 was gradually thermally imidized with the following curing procedure: 80℃/3h, 120℃/1h, 150℃/1h, 180℃/1h, 250℃/1h, 300℃/1h, and 350℃/0.5h. Then, the glass substrate was immersed in warm deionized water to obtain the free-standing POSS-PI-30 film. The other PAA solutions and the corresponding PI films, including POSS-PI-10, POSS-PI-15, POSS-PI-20, and POSS-PI-25 were prepared according to a similar procedure. The difference was the contents of DABA-POSS were different.

溶剂量.单值: 调整反应混合物固含量为20wt%

反应条件.制备过程: POSS-PAA-25按照与POSS-PAA-30类似的流程制备，仅DABA-POSS的含量不同；将原料加入烧瓶，氮气氛围下5-10℃搅拌2h得到澄清溶液，之后加入PMDA和额外DMAc调整固含量为20wt%，移除冷浴后室温搅拌反应22h

后处理步骤: 所得深棕色粘稠溶液经0.45μm聚四氟乙烯（PTFE）针头过滤器过滤

位置索引.原文: The other PAA solutions and the corresponding PI films, including POSS-PI-10, POSS-PI-15, POSS-PI-20, and POSS-PI-25 were prepared according to a similar procedure. The difference was the contents of DABA-POSS were different. The experimental device is equipped with a mechanical stirrer, an ice-cold bath, and a 500-mL three-necked round-bottom flask with nitrogen inlet. First, ODA, DABA-POSS, TSP-POSS and ultra-dry DMAc solvent were added into the flask. A clear solution was obtained after stirring at 5 - 10°C for 2h under nitrogen flow. Then, PMDA and the additional DMAc were added to the reaction mixture obtained above. The solid content of the reaction mixture was adjusted to be 20wt% by this procedure. The cold bath was removed and the reaction mixture was stirred at room temperature for another 22h. The deep-brown viscous solution obtained was filtered through a 0.45 - μm polytetrafluoroethylene (PTFE) syringe filter. Then the prepared POSS-PAA solution was stored in a glass bottle at -18°C before use.

后处理步骤: 热酰亚胺化完成后，将玻璃基底浸入温去离子水中，剥离得到自支撑POSS-PI-25薄膜

The POSS-PAA-30 was gradually thermally imidized with the following curing procedure: 80°C / 3h, 120°C / 1h, 150°C / 1h, 180°C / 1h, 250°C / 1h, 300°C / 1h, and 350°C / 0.5h. Then, the glass substrate was immersed in warm deionized water to obtain the free-standing POSS-PI-30 film. The other PAA solutions and the corresponding PI films, including POSS-PI-25 were prepared according to a similar procedure.

位置索引.原文: Polyimide (PI) was prepared via a typical two-step method with a synthesis of poly(amic acid) (PAA) and subsequent thermal imidization. Specifically,  1.00mmol DMMDA was charged into a  50 mL three-necked flask, and  4.94g of NMP was added to dissolve DMMDA under magnetic stirring. Exactly  1.00mmol  BTDA was added after DMMDA dissolved completely. The reaction was conducted under  N₂ atmosphere for  4h at room temperature in order to obtain the viscous PAA solution. Subsequently, another  5.48g  of NMP was added to dilute the PAA solution to  5wt% to obtain proper viscosity for spin-casting on ITO glass. The polycondensation of BTDA and ODA as well as ODPA and ODA was obtained in the same manner that poly(amic acid) based on  3,3′,4,4′-benzophenonetetracarboxylic dianhydride and 4,4-diaminodiphenyl ether (BTDA-ODA PAA) and poly(amic acid) based on  4,4′-Oxydiphthalic anhydride and 4,4-diaminodiphenyl ether (ODPA-ODA PAA) were obtained.

反应条件.反应装置: 摩擦机、加热板、UV辐照装置
反应条件.制备过程: 两片涂覆DA-0的ITO玻璃经摩擦后，按反平行摩擦方向组装，由adhesive film spacer设定盒隙为40μm；将DA与LC按0/100重量比室温磁力搅拌混合4h，混合物在95℃加热板下通过毛细管作用灌入组装好的盒中，95℃保温20min消除流动效应，随后用非偏振UV光辐照0.5h，光源与细胞距离10cm
反应条件.反应条件: UV光源功率300 W

位置索引.原文: Two pieces of coated ITO glass were rubbed with a rubbing machine (TianLi Co. Ltd., Guangdong, China) and assembled in the antiparallel rubbing direction with a cell gap of 40 μm, which was set by an adhesive film spacer. DA was mechanically mixed with LC at weight ratios of 2/98, 1/99, 0.5/0.95, and 0/100 under magnetic stirring for 4h at room temperature. The mixtures were charged into cells by a capillary action at 95℃ on a plate heater, and the cells were maintained at 95℃ for another 20min to eliminate the flow effect. The cells were radiated with unpolarized UV light (OSRAM 300 W, ORSAM, Munich, Bayern, Germany) for 0.5h and the distance between light and cells was 10cm.

反应条件.制备过程: 首先ODA完全溶解在NMP后，将溶液移入冰浴20min；然后逐步加入6FDA，冰浴中搅拌反应1h；移除冰浴，室温下搅拌5h；之后加入PEPA和剩余的NMP，继续搅拌24h，得到固含量15%的苯乙炔封端PAA溶液；将PAA溶液加入300mL乙醇中沉淀得到PAA纤维

First, after ODA was completely dissolved in NMP, the solution was moved into an ice bath for 20 min. Then, 6FDA was added gradually, and the reaction was stirred for 1 h in the ice bath. After that, the ice bath was removed, and the mixture was stirred for 5 h at room temperature. Then, the PEPA and the remainder of the NMP were added, the solution was stirred for another 24 h, and a phenylethynyl-terminated PAA solution with a solid content of 15% was obtained. 位置索引.原文: The process of thermal curing was conducted in a muffle furnace under an air atmosphere, and the whole curing procedure with a heating rate of 1°C / min was carried out as follows: 80°C for 4h, 120°C for 4h, 150°C for 4h, 180°C for 2h, 250°C for 2h, 280°C for 2h, 320°C for 2h, and 370°C for 1h. Casting SiO2@TSPI (C-SiO@TSPI) composite films were thermally cured the same way. In order to avoid the formation of cracks, guarantee shape stability, and fully release the internal stress during the heat treatment process for uncured parts, different curing procedures were utilized to prepare C-TSPI and C-SiO2@TSPI films for SiO2@TSPI-26.3%.

反应条件.制备过程: SiO2@GO-NH2 wet gels were prepared using the sol-gel method. Specifically, 25mg of GO was added to 75 mL of 20vol% TEOS ethanol solution, ultrasonically treated for 30min, which ensured the system was well dispersed. Afterward, 10.5 mL of 0.1M hydrochloric acid was added to acidify the system and was then ultrasonically treated for 5min to fully hydrolyze the TEOS. A total of 4.5 mL of 10.79wt.% 3ATPES ethanol solution was titrated slowly with slow mechanical stirring to gel the system and stirred for 24h.

位置索引.原文: SiO2@GO-NH2 wet gels were prepared using the sol-gel method. Afterward, 10.5 mL of 0.1M hydrochloric acid was added to acidify the system and was then ultrasonically treated for 5min to fully hydrolyze the TEOS. A total of 4.5 mL of 10.79wt.% 3ATPES ethanol solution was titrated slowly with slow mechanical stirring to gel the system and stirred for 24h. The SiO2@GO-NH2 wet gel was then obtained.

反应条件.反应条件: 冷冻温度-65°C，冷冻时间4h，冷冻干燥48h；热处理程序：80°C 30min，110°C 30min，195°C 120min，290°C 60min，氮气保护

位置索引.原文: Similarly, a series of PI aerogels were prepared with different ratios of SiO2@GO-NH2 wet gels to study the effect of doping amount on the aerogel properties; the prepared PI aerogels were named PI-0, PI-0.5, PI-1, PI-1.5, and PI-2. The obtained wet gels were poured into molds and frozen in a cold trap at -65°C for 4h, before being freeze-dried for 48h. The molds were pre-cooled in the cold trap in advance. The obtained aerogels were heat-treated at 80°C for 30min, 110°C for 30min, 195°C for 120min, and 290°C for 60min under nitrogen protection to obtain PI aerogels.

位置索引.原文: PI resins were prepared from 6FDA and the diamines via a two-step chemical imidization procedure, which could be illustrated by the synthesis of FPI-5 (6FDA-DABC). The other PI resins, including FPI-1 (6FDA-TFMDA)... were prepared according to a similar procedure as mentioned above, except DABC was replaced by TFMDA for FPI-1. DABC and DMAc were filled into a three-necked 500 mL flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer, a nitrogen inlet, and a cold-water bath. The diamine solution was stirred at 10 - 15°C for 30min under nitrogen and 6FDA was added in one batch together with an additional DMAc. The solid content of the polymerization mixture was controlled to be 25wt%. The cold bath was removed after 4h and the viscous solution was further stirred at room temperature for another 20h. A pale-yellow poly(amic acid) (PAA) solution was obtained.

FPI-5 resin was then precipitated from the PI solution. The resin was thoroughly immersed into the ethanol solution and then collected. The wet resin was dried under vacuum at 120°C for 24h to afford the FPI-5 resin as a pale-yellow fibrous resin. FPI-1 was prepared via the same procedure.

位置索引.原文: DABC  (14.5200g,50mmol)  and DMAc  (100.0g)  were filled into a three-necked  500mL  flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer, a nitrogen inlet, and a cold-water bath. The diamine solution was stirred at  10 - 15°C  for  30min  under nitrogen and 6FDA  (22.2120g,50mmol)  was added in one batch together with an additional DMAc  (10.2g) . The solid content of the polymerization mixture was controlled to be  25wt% . The cold bath was removed after  4h  and the viscous solution was further stirred at room temperature for another  20h . A pale-yellow poly(amic acid) (PAA) solution was obtained.

反应条件.制备过程: 向PAA溶液中剧烈搅拌下加入乙酸酐和吡啶，室温下进行化学酰亚胺化反应24h

The chemical imidization procedure was performed at room temperature for another  24h . At last, the polymerization mixture was slowly poured into an excess of aqueous ethanol solution  (75wt%) . FPI-5 resin was then precipitated from the PI solution. The resin was thoroughly immersed into the ethanol solution and then collected. The wet resin was dried under vacuum at  120°C  for  24h  to afford the FPI-5 resin as a pale-yellow fibrous resin. Yield:  34.06g(97.5%) .

反应条件.制备过程: 对PI-ODA原始薄膜先进行摩擦（RUB）处理，再进行拉伸（STR）处理，得到PI-ODA RUB STR；摩擦处理使用表面覆盖天鹅绒的旋转圆柱，每片薄膜摩擦30s；拉伸处理通过波纹金属表面按压使PI薄膜表面发生机械形变，处理过程中将PI薄膜固定在玻璃基底上，类似液晶盒结构

位置索引.原文: stretching after rubbing (RUB STR). The rubbing of the samples was achieved with a lab-made device having a rotating cylinder (diameter = 1.2 cm), which moves at 180 rot/min. The material used for surface modification was velvet, which was found on the surface of the cylinder. The rubbing procedure was undertaken for 30 s for each PI film. The film stretching was carried out by subjecting the PI surface to mechanical deformation by pressing with a corrugated metallic surface. During this procedure, the PI films were fixed on a glass substrate (as in LC cell)

文献信息.论文标题: Development and Morphological Characterization of Novel Polyimide/Metal nano Hybrid Materials

形貌.仪器: Scanning Probe Microscope (Solver PRO-M, NTMDT, Russia)

反应条件.制备过程: 等摩尔量的DDM和6HDA在DMAc中进行缩聚反应，总反应物浓度为14-15%，惰性气氛下反应

反应条件.制备过程: 对聚(酰胺酸)溶液进行热酰亚胺化，加热至回流温度，通过缓慢氮气流除去亚胺化生成的水

位置索引.原文: In the second step, thermal imidization of the resulting poly(amic acid) in solution was performed in the same reaction flask by heating the solution at reflux temperature  (170 - 180°C)  for  5 - 6h , under a slow stream of nitrogen to remove the water of imidization. The final product was precipitated in water, washed with water and ethanol, and dried in vacuum oven at  105°C.

位置索引.原文: The PIs PIa-PIc-t of 6FDA and HAT-T, with different diamines (SDA, TFDB and PABZ) were synthesized. The syntheses of PIs with different diamines were similar. Take PIa-t synthesis as an example. A mixed solution of 6FDA (2.2212g,5mmol), HAT-T (15.55mg, 0.035mmol), DMF 10mL and SDA (991.88mg,4.953mmol;20mL DMF) solution, N₂ protection, solid content of 10% ice bath reaction for 16h then 2mL of acetic anhydride and pyridine mixed solution (V acetic anhydride: V pyridine = 1:1) was added, reacted at 60℃ for 6h, cooled to room temperature, poured into methanol solution, precipitated to yellow solid, filtered, dried and fibrous PI polymer was obtained. PIa(6FDA/SDA) is synthesized without HAT-T following the same procedure.

反应条件.制备过程: 将PIa(6FDA/SDA)聚合物溶解于氯仿，配制成浓度为2wt%的溶液，过滤后浇铸到玻璃板上

位置索引.原文: The polymer was dissolved in chloroform at a concentration of 2wt%, filtered and cast onto a glass plate. The film was further dried at 80.0°C / 1h, 120.0°C / 1h, 160.0°C / 1h and 200.0°C / 1h to obtain the corresponding PI film.

位置索引.原文: The PIs PIa-PIc-t of 6FDA and HAT-T, with different diamines (SDA, TFDB and PABZ) were synthesized. The syntheses of PIs with different diamines were similar. Take PIa-t synthesis as an example. A mixed solution of 6FDA (2.2212g,5mmol) , HAT-T (15.55mg, 0.035mmol) , DMF 10mL and SDA (991.88mg,4.953mmol;20mL DMF) solution, N2 protection, solid content of 10% ice bath reaction for 16h then 2mL of acetic anhydride and pyridine mixed solution (V acetic anhydride: V pyridine = 1:1) was added, reacted at 60℃ for 6h, cooled to room temperature, poured into methanol solution, precipitated to yellow solid, filtered, dried and fibrous PI polymer containing the hexazazobenzophenol structure was obtained.

工艺流程.产物名称: Amino-Capped Aniline Tetramer (ACAT) 蓝色粉末

反应条件.溶剂: DMF/H2O/1N HCl 三元溶剂体系
反应条件.制备过程: First, diphenylamine (0.01mol) and 4,4′-diaminodiphenyl-amine sulphate (0.01mol) were dissolved in a tri-solvent system of DMF (100mL), H2O (20mL) and 1N HCl (25mL). After that, ammonium persulphate solution (2.28g in 25mL of 1N HCl) was added slowly to the above-mentioned solution at 0°C via a dropping funnel. Subsequently, the reaction mixture was stirred at 0°C for one hour.

后处理步骤: 将反应产物沉淀于700mL蒸馏水
依次用400mL 1N HCl、100mL 1.2N NH4OH、蒸馏水洗涤沉淀
粗产物在50℃真空干燥，得到蓝色粉末产物

位置索引.原文: As shown in Scheme I, aniline tetramer (ACAT) was prepared using a simple procedure [62]. First, diphenylamine (0.01mol) and 4,4′-diaminodiphenyl-amine sulphate (0.01mol) were dissolved in a tri-solvent system of DMF (100mL), H2O (20mL) and 1N HCl (25mL). After that, ammonium persulphate solution (2.28g in 25mL of 1N HCl) was added slowly to the above-mentioned solution at 0°C via a dropping funnel. Subsequently, after one hour of stirring at 0°C the reaction was precipitated out in distilled water (700mL). Finally, the vacuum filtration was used to obtain the precipitate followed by a washing with 400mL of HCl (1N), 100mL of NH4OH (1.2N), and distilled water. Lastly, the crude product of ACAT was dried in a vacuum at 50°C and obtained as blue powder.

反应条件.制备过程: 将4,4′-(4.4′-isopropylidenediphenoxy) bis (phthalic anhydride)和ACAT加入DMAc中，室温搅拌24h得到electroactive polyamic acid

位置索引.原文: First, 0.52g of 4,4′-(4.4′-isopropylidenediphenoxy) bis (phthalic anhydride) and 0.379g of ACAT were added to 16g of DMAc in a two-neck-round bottom flask. The reaction mixture was stirred for 24h at room temperature to produce electroactive polyamic acid (EPAA).

位置索引.原文: One PI homopolymer, PI-1 and five PI copolymers were synthesized according to the formulations shown in Table 1. The detailed synthesis procedure could be illustrated by the synthesis of SPI-4. The other PI resins were similarly prepared, except that the molar ratio of the TM-MDA/TSN was set to be 100:0 for PI-1. After stirring at 10°C for 0.5 h, a clear diamine solution was obtained. Then, BTDA and DMAc were added into the obtained diamine solution to afford a polymerization system with a solid content of 25 wt%. After stirring at 10°C for 4 h, the cold bath was removed, and room temperature was maintained for another 20 h for the reaction system so as to increase the molecular weights of the obtained poly (amic acid) (PAA) precursor.

反应条件.制备过程: 向聚酰胺酸溶液中加入乙酸酐和吡啶，室温搅拌24h，完成聚酰胺酸到聚酰亚胺的脱水酰亚胺化

Stoichiometric imbalances were used to control the molecular weight of polyimides, and the PA was used as an end capper for terminating polymer chains.

位置索引.原文: section 2.2. Synthesis of Polymers line 44-49: A typical synthesis procedure for the polyimide derived from HQDPA/TPEQ (PI-2) was carried out as follows: A 250-mL, three-necked flask fitted with a nitrogen inlet tube and a condenser with a Dean-Stark trap was used as the reaction vessel. HQDPA (7.7244 g, 19.2 mmol), TPEQ (5.8466 g, 20.0 mmol) and PA (0.2370 g, 1.6 mmol) were firstly added to the reaction vessel. m-Cresol was added to achieve a 10% solid content, and then a few drops of isoquinoline were added successively as the catalyst. The reaction mixture was reacted at 200 °C for 8 h under nitrogen to afford the polyimide. After cooling down, ethanol was added to the reaction mixture. The precipitated polyimide was collected by filtration, followed by thorough washing with ethanol and dried in a vacuum oven at 200 °C for 2 h.

反应条件.制备过程: Heat polyimide powder under pressure, then slowly cool to room temperature to form film

位置索引.原文: Into a  250 mL three-necked flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer and a nitrogen inlet, the diamine BDAF (5.1845g, 0.01mol) was first dissolved in newly distilled DMAc (20g). Then, the dianhydride HTDA (3.0631g, 0.01mol) and additional DMAc (4.7g) were added into the homogeneous diamine solution, producing a reaction system with a solid content of 25wt%. After stirring at room temperature for 24h, a mixture of acetic anhydride (5.1g, 0.05mol) and pyridine (3.2g, 0.04mol) was then added. The reaction solution was stirred at room temperature for another 24h. Then, the obtained viscous solution was carefully poured into an excess of ethanol to yield white resin. The resin was filtered and dried at  80°C in vacuum for  24h (Yield:  ~96%). The well-dried PI resin was redissolved into DMAc with a solid content of 10wt%. Then, the PI solution was filtered through a  0.45μm Teflon filter to remove any impurities. Next, the PI solution was slowly poured into the highly pure ethanol to afford the PI resin.
In order to understand the effects of the molecular structure on the properties of the PIs, the PI (HTDA-BDAF) film was also prepared with a procedure according to our previous work [30].

位置索引.原文: Four PI NFMs (PI-1~PI-4) were fabricated via the electrospinning procedure with the tailored solid contents of the PI solutions, the electrospinning voltage, and the inner diameters (IDs) of the spinnerets, as shown in Table 1. The fully dried PI (HTDA-BDAF) resin was dissolved in DMAc at room temperature with different solid contents of  25 - 35wt%  to obtain the electrospinning solution. 反应条件.制备过程: 将PI溶液装入注射器，通过注射泵挤出，施加高压后纤维沉积在收集器的铝箔上

位置索引.原文: The PI solution was loaded into a  5mL  syringe and squeezed out through a spinneret by a syringe pump at a speed of  0.2mL / h . The ID values of the spinneret were 0.21 or  0.50mm . Different voltages of  12 - 18kV  were applied between the syringe and the rolling drum collector. The distance between the spinneret and the collector (alumina foil) was  15cm . Random aligned PI fibers were deposited on the aluminum foil located on the rotating drum collector (speed:  200rpm ). The temperature and relative humidity during electrospinning were fixed at about  20 ± 2°C  and  30 ± 5% , respectively. 位置索引.原文: Into a 250 mL three-necked flask equipped with a mechanical stirrer and a nitrogen inlet, the diamine BDAF (5.1845g, 0.01mol) was first dissolved in newly distilled DMAc (20g). Then, the dianhydride HTDA (3.0631g, 0.01mol) and additional DMAc (4.7g) were added into the homogeneous diamine solution, producing a reaction system with a solid content of 25wt%. After stirring at room temperature for 24h, a mixture of acetic anhydride (5.1g, 0.05mol) and pyridine (3.2g, 0.04mol) was then added. The reaction solution was stirred at room temperature for another 24h. Then, the obtained viscous solution was carefully poured into an excess of ethanol to yield white resin. The resin was filtered and dried at 80°C in vacuum for 24h (Yield: ~96%). The well-dried PI resin was redissolved into DMAc with a solid content of 10wt%. Then, the PI solution was filtered through a 0.45μm Teflon filter to remove any impurities. Next, the PI solution was slowly poured into the highly pure ethanol to afford the PI resin.

位置索引.原文: Four PI NFMs (PI-1~PI-4) were fabricated via the electrospinning procedure with the tailored solid contents of the PI solutions, the electrospinning voltage, and the inner diameters (IDs) of the spinnerets, as shown in Table 1. The PI solution was loaded into a 5mL syringe and squeezed out through a spinneret by a syringe pump at a speed of 0.2mL / h. The ID values of the spinneret were 0.21 or 0.50mm. Different voltages of 12 - 18kV were applied between the syringe and the rolling drum collector. The distance between the spinneret and the collector (alumina foil) was 15cm. 反应条件.制备过程: Gold wires are soldered to polished copper wires. A pair of soldered Au-Cu wires with 200 μm gap is mounted into a custom Teflon bar. Wires are ultrasonically cleaned in detergent solution, washed sequentially with water, acetone, methanol, water, then dried. Cyanoacrylate adhesive is applied to fix wires. Exposed Au ends are polished with 1200 grit abrasive paper and 3 μm alumina slurry, then washed with methanol, sonicated in ultrapure water for 5 min, and dried.

位置索引.原文: Substrate preparation. The substrate (Figure 1b) is composed of gold wires (18 karats, ∅ = 0.5mm, l = 0.5cm) soldered to polished copper wires (∅ = 0.5mm, l = 2.5cm). A pair of soldered Au-Cu wires, separated by a 200 μm gap, was mounted into a custom made Teflon bar (10mm × 10mm × 4mm). The wires were cleaned via ultrasonication in detergent solution for 15min. This step was immediately followed with washing of wires using water, acetone, methanol, water, and then dried. The wires were held in a sturdy and upright position by applying a cyanoacrylate adhesive (Mighty Bond™ by Pioneer ® adhesives). The exposed Au ends, which served as the substrate, were subsequently polished with high grade of abrasive paper (1200 grit) and pad with aluminum slurry (∅ = 3 μm). The polished electrodes were then washed with methanol, sonicated in ultrapure water for 5 minutes, and dried.
